---
title: pelican cache introspect
---

## pelican cache introspect

Introspect the cache's persistent database

### Synopsis

Inspect the contents of the cache server's persistent cache.

These commands allow administrators to examine cached objects, their metadata,
and verify data integrity. If the cache server is running, commands connect
to its API automatically; otherwise they fall back to direct database access.

The cache directory is derived from Cache.StorageLocation configuration.

### Options

```
      --cache-dir string   Override cache directory (default: from config)
  -h, --help               help for introspect
      --json               Output in JSON format
      --offline            Force offline mode (direct database access). By default, if the cache is running, queries go to the live service.
  -t, --token string       Path to admin token file (online mode only; auto-generated if not provided)
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --config string       config file (default is $HOME/.config/pelican/pelican.yaml)
  -d, --debug               Enable debug log messages
  -f, --federation string   Pelican federation to utilize
  -L, --log string          Specified log output file
      --version             Print the version and exit
```
